headline: News (NWSA) Stock Could Be 23.4% Undervalued After $1b Buyback Approval
summary: Auditor rotation puts News stock under the microscope News (NWSA) has drawn fresh attention after its board approved a new share repurchase authorization and outlined a planned shift in external auditors, a combination that invites closer scrutiny from investors. See our latest analysis for News. At a share price of $25.98, News has seen short term share price pressure, with a 7 day share price return that declined 3.67%, while its 3 year total shareholder return of 38.05% reflects a much...
